untranslatable_reason: This signal requires implied volatility surface metrics (IV skewness, term structure slope, strike dispersion, IV surface dynamics) that are not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal depends on options market data (IV curves, delta-specific volatility levels, surface curvature) that cannot be constructed from equity price action indicators (RSI, moving averages, ATR, Bollinger Bands, etc.). Required metrics: IV surface skewness, 30-day vs 90-day IV comparison, ATM vs 25-delta strangle IV differential, and IV forecast confidence scores. These are derivatives/options-specific indicators not present in the allowed set.
translation_notes: Signal SINCLAIR_DRY_1_0 is a volatility surface monitoring rule from derivatives trading context. It requires options-specific inputs (implied volatility surface geometry, term structure analysis, strike skew measurements) that cannot be replicated using only equity price-based technical indicators. To implement this signal, the backtest engine would need to support options data feeds and IV surface construction indicators.
